message:
fix(doctor): exclude wisp tables from Dolt Status/Locks warnings (GH#2079)

Wisp tables are ephemeral and excluded from Dolt version tracking via
dolt_ignore, but dolt_status still reports them as having uncommitted
changes. This created self-fulfilling warnings in bd doctor that could
never be cleared.

Add isWispTable() predicate to filter wisp tables from both the
"Dolt Status" and "Dolt Locks" doctor checks.

Co-Authored-By: ruby <xexr@xexr.com>
